project.name: Horizons Getaways — Script Dashboard
project.description: Interactive B2B cold outbound call script dashboard for Horizons Getaways sales managers. Used during live phone calls to US travel agencies (Southeast focus) to pitch a glamping/outdoor hospitality partnership and referral program.

business_context.offer: Partnership / Referral Program — agencies refer clients, earn commission per booking, zero operational overhead

architecture.auth_flow: src/main.jsx checks Supabase session -> LoginScreen or Dashboard

user_notes.description: Dynamic notes created by managers per script module, stored per user with Row Level Security

columns.module_id: text (references script module ID like 'opening', 'pitch', etc.)

panels.top_left: Script — current module text, cognitive tip, title, stage/method badge
panels.top_right: Topics & Responses — current client responses + all modules grouped by stage
panels.bottom_left: Notes — static script tips + dynamic user notes (add/check/delete, synced to Supabase)

ui_layout.header: Company name, subtitle, user email, Restart Call button, Sign Out button

Opening.description: First contact — personalized opener and credibility establishment

Value Pitch.description: Core value proposition — partnership offer, commission details, property info

Qualification.description: SPIN discovery questions and onboarding process explanation

Close.description: Schedule meeting, post-call checklist, callback scheduling

Objections.description: 8 objection-handling modules with specific reframes and pivots

Info Modules.description: On-demand info blocks — referral tracking, seasonality, families, support, graceful exit

module_structure.stageNum: Stage number or label (1-5, OBJ, INFO)
module_structure.method: Sales methodology used (SPIN, SNAP, H2H, Challenger)
module_structure.title: Display title
module_structure.script: Actual words to say (with [placeholders] for personalization)
module_structure.responses: Array of {label, next} — client response options that navigate to other modules

script_modules.navigation: Graph-based — each module links to others via response buttons. Non-linear flow, caller jumps based on client reaction.

implemented: Interactive script navigation with response-based routing
Per-module cognitive tips and manager coaching notes
Row Level Security — each manager sees only their own notes
Quick jump to any module via topic groups
not_yet_implemented: Manager analytics (calls made, modules visited, conversion tracking)
Admin panel for managing manager accounts
Fill in actual commission numbers and property details in [placeholders]

files.index.html: HTML entry point with favicon link
files.src/main.jsx: App root — auth session check, renders LoginScreen or HorizonsScript
files.src/supabase.js: Supabase client initialization (reads from env vars)
files.horizons-getaways-script.jsx: Main dashboard component — all script data, UI, Supabase notes CRUD
files.supabase-migration.sql: SQL to create user_notes table with RLS policies
files..env: Environment variables (VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY) — not in git
